rows.label: qev055106_MSG0001
rows.name:
The last time I saw him
was at the elevator in the Residential Area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055106_MSG0002
rows.name:
I watched him head up the elevator
toward the Ma-non ship,
and then I returned to the Residential Area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055106_MSG0003
rows.name:
...This is all the information we have, but
please, listen to the people in the city
and find out where Sun'osaragu is.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055106_MSG0004
rows.name:
Sun'osaragu is a highly capable engineer, and
anticipating an emergency like this,
he left several pieces of equipment on the Ma-non ship.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055106_MSG0005
rows.name:
If we use the stealth gear he left behind,
we should be able to head to the Valley of Oblivion ourselves.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055106_MSG0006
rows.name:
Please do not worry about us,
and head to his rescue first.[ST:wait ]
